texto: PR *is* a shrewd, rough game. It's learning to psychologically manipulate, play on people's greed and vanity. Convincing a target audience to buy products and services they neither need nor want. Profiting from making them spend hard-earned money and feeling happy about doing it. Smiling as they empty their wallets. It's devious exploitation, taking advantage of the human psyche, and I'm good at it. Very good.
explicacao: Citação de Graham Diamond sobre temas ligados a negocios. “PR *is* a shrewd, rough game. It's learning to psychologically manipulate, play on people's greed…” articula negocios, marketing, pr em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como termino e pr.
